role: Automation scripts for building, watching, validating, and releasing the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: Collectively, these scripts manage the complete development lifecycle: clean builds, incremental development watching, pre-release quality gates, and schema validation of protocol assets.

children.role: Build orchestration script for the ArchSpine project (TypeScript compilation, resource copying, and mock cleanup).
Describes the automated build-watcher script for the ArchSpine project's development workflow
Automated release gate script for project quality validation
Schema validation script for ArchSpine protocol assets
